gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.id) FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN rulings AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.rarity = 'rare' AND T2.date = '2007-02-01'
pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.id) FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN rulings AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.rarity = 'rare' AND T2.date = '2007-02-01'
question: How many cards with print rarity have ruling text printed on 01/02/2007?
